Class MethodContext

java.lang.Object
com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext
public class MethodContext extends Object
Mutable bag of state representing a single in-flight HTTP request as it travels through the interceptor pipeline.

Created by RequestProxyEngine from the method's @Request annotation, then passed to each interceptor's before() method so it can be enriched (e.g. path variables resolved, query params appended, headers injected) before being handed to the executor.

This class intentionally carries only transport-level concerns (URL, method, body, headers, runtime args, and the reflected method). Deserialization metadata is an executor concern and is not stored here.

Use builder() for a fluent construction style.

  • Constructor Details

    • MethodContext

      public MethodContext(String url, String method, String body, String[] headers, Object[] args, Method reflectionMethod)
      Full constructor. Prefer builder() for readability.
      Parameters:
      url - the initial URL or URL template
      method - the HTTP verb
      body - the request body (may be empty)
      headers - header name/value pairs
      args - runtime arguments passed to the proxy method
      reflectionMethod - the reflected proxy method

  • Method Details

    • getUrl

      public String getUrl()
      Returns:
      the current URL (may still contain unresolved placeholders if interceptors have not run yet)

    • setUrl

      public void setUrl(String url)
      Parameters:
      url - the resolved or partially-resolved URL

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns:
      the request body string

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Parameters:
      body - the request body to use

    • getMethod

      public String getMethod()
      Returns:
      the HTTP verb string

    • setMethod

      public void setMethod(String method)
      Parameters:
      method - the HTTP verb string

    • getHeaders

      public String[] getHeaders()
      Returns:
      the HTTP header strings in alternating name/value pairs

    • setHeaders

      public void setHeaders(String[] headers)
      Parameters:
      headers - header strings in alternating "Name", "value" format

    • getArgs

      public Object[] getArgs()
      Returns:
      the runtime argument values passed to the proxy method

    • setArgs

      public void setArgs(Object[] args)
      Parameters:
      args - the runtime arguments

    • getReflectionMethod

      public Method getReflectionMethod()
      Returns:
      the reflected proxy method used for annotation lookups

    • setReflectionMethod

      public void setReflectionMethod(Method reflectionMethod)
      Parameters:
      reflectionMethod - the reflected method

    • builder

      public static MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder builder()
      Returns a new MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder for fluent construction.
      Returns:
      a fresh builder
